scripts.bdd: npm run bddgen && npx playwright test --reporter=list,allure-playwright
scripts.bdd:headed: npm run bddgen && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e: npm run bddgen && npx playwright test --grep-invert @accessibility --reporter=list,allure-playwright
scripts.test:a11y: npm run bddgen && npx playwright test --grep @accessibility --reporter=list,allure-playwright
scripts.clean: rimraf test-results allure-results allure-report playwright-report .features-gen a11y-report-data a11y-report
